shellCommands.command:
cd /home/user/workspace && python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from run import run_tasks

async def main():
    events=[]
    async def make(i):
        async def task():
            events.append(("start", i))
            try:
                await asyncio.sleep(0.01)
            finally:
                events.append(("cleanup", i))
        return task
    tasks=[await make(i) for i in range(5)]
    await run_tasks(tasks, 2)
    print(events)
asyncio.run(main())
